attributes.name: card-slot
attributes.description: Applied to a slotted child used in card composition, allowing the child to style itself for a card context.

attributes.name: card-body-size-none-slot
attributes.description: Applied to a slotted child in a Card Body with size none, allowing edge-to-edge spacing.

attributes.name: card-body-size-none-slot-first
attributes.description: Applied to the first slat in a Card Body with size none, allowing its exposed top radius to match the card.

attributes.name: card-body-size-none-slot-last
attributes.description: Applied to the last slat in a Card Body with size none, allowing its exposed bottom radius to match the card.
